code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test01-JAN-2021Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine and significant proteinuria, suggesting impaired renal function, possibly chronic kidney disease. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, and contains glucose, ketones, and bilirubin, but no evidence of infection. Blood glucose is normal. Lipid profile is within normal limits. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further assessment of renal function and possible underlying causes.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
